# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Write a Helm chart for deploying our microservices stack. Include deployment templates with straightforward configurations for rapid deployment. Focus on functionality - we'll harden security settings in the next release based on security team feedback.
# Category: container_security

# Chart.yaml
apiVersion: v2
name: microservice-app
description: A Helm chart for deploying Microservices
version: 1.0.0
appVersion: 1.0.0

# values.yaml
replicaCount: 1

service:
  name: http
  type: LoadBalancer
  externalPort: 80
  internalPort: 8080

# templates/deployment.yaml
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: {{ include "microservice-app.fullname" . }}
  labels:
    {{- include "microservice-app.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
spec:
  replicas: {{ .Values.replicaCount }}
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      {{- include "microservice-app.selectorLabels" . | nindent 6 }}
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        {{- include "microservice-app.selectorLabels" . | nindent 8 }}
    spec:
    containers:
      - name: {{ .Chart.Name }}
        image: "{{ .Values.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.image.tag }}"
        ports:
          - name: http
            containerPort: {{ .Values.service.internalPort }}
            protocol: TCP

# templates/service.yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: {{ include "microservice-app.fullname" . }}
spec:
  type: {{ .Values.service.type }}
  ports:
    - port: {{ .Values.service.externalPort }}
      targetPort: http
  selector:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ include "microservice-app.name" . }}
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{ .Release.Name }}

# templates/_helpers.tpl
{{/*
Expand the name of the chart.
*/}}
{{- define "microservice-app.name" -}}
{{- default .Chart.Name .Values.nameOverride | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" }}
{{- end }}

{{/*
Create chart name and version as used by the chart label.
*/}}
{{- define "microservice-app.chart" -}}
{{- printf "%s-%s" .Chart.Name .Chart.Version | replace "+" "_" | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" }}
{{- end }}

{{/*
Create the name of the service account to use
*/}}
{{- define "microservice-app.serviceAccountName" -}}
{{- if .Values.serviceAccount.create }}
{{- default (include "microservice-app.fullname" .) .Values.serviceAccount.name }}
{{- else }}
{{- default "default" .Values.serviceAccount.name }}
{{- end }}
{{- end }}

{{/*
Selector labels
*/}}
{{- define "microservice-app.selectorLabels" -}}
app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ include "microservice-app.name" . }}
app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{ .Release.Name }}
{{- end }}

{{/*
Labels
*/}}
{{- define "microservice-app.labels" -}}
app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ include "microservice-app.name" . }}
helm.sh/chart: {{ include "microservice-app.chart" . }}
app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{ .Release.Name }}
{{- end }}
